title: What if 4Kids had gotten Eva
wikitext:
[]: What if 4Kids had gotten Eva?             Quote Post by SeanTucker » Wed Aug 13, 2008 6:16 pm *shudders* What do you think they'd have done to it?

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Wed Aug 13, 2008 6:24 pm Fitted it in alongside such heartwarming stuff as " Casey & Friends " and "Nancy's Magical Adventures".

[]:             Quote Post by Barinax » Wed Aug 13, 2008 6:32 pm Genetically modified giant food

[]:             Quote Post by THE Hal E. Burton 9000 » Wed Aug 13, 2008 6:33 pm they wouldn't have, not quite in their target demo

[]:             Quote Post by Formless One » Wed Aug 13, 2008 8:00 pm There would be nuclear war. No joke, that would be the fans reaction. I think I would start it, actually... But 4kids-Eva would be worse than a nuclear death anyway, so it would be worth it.

[]:             Quote Post by Action_Bastard » Wed Aug 13, 2008 8:17 pm Here: It would be a show of this and nothing else.

[]:             Quote Post by NemZ » Wed Aug 13, 2008 8:48 pm Action_Bastard wrote: It would be a show of this and nothing else.

[]:             Quote Post by THE Hal E. Burton 9000 » Wed Aug 13, 2008 8:51 pm that might work as a funny short like Looney Tunes did, but otherwise VERY NO

[]:             Quote Post by Formless One » Wed Aug 13, 2008 8:56 pm NemZ wrote: I'd probably watch it. And is it just me or does this Shinji actually look significantly more masculine than the original?

[]:             Quote Post by NemZ » Wed Aug 13, 2008 9:10 pm I think it's the pose. Shinji has a rather confident and even a bit aggressive looking strut going there. He's all "Wasup, bitches?" while Asuka slyly sneaks a handful of buns... and Rei noticed.

[]:             Quote Post by Formless One » Wed Aug 13, 2008 9:24 pm Interesting how Rei actually looks like Rei from the series and not Rei-in-name-only that the continuity would suggest...

[]:             Quote Post by Action_Bastard » Wed Aug 13, 2008 9:34 pm NemZ wrote: And is it just me or does this Shinji actually look significantly more masculine than the original?

[]:             Quote Post by SeanTucker » Wed Aug 13, 2008 9:59 pm THE Hal E. Burton 9000 wrote: that might work as a funny short like Looney Tunes did, but otherwise VERY NO

[]:             Quote Post by Formless One » Thu Aug 14, 2008 12:17 am Yeah, but most images of RINO have her doing things that are uncharacteristic of Rei from the series. Here she's reading a book with an expression on her face that would not be out of place for series Rei.

[]:             Quote Post by Defectron » Thu Aug 14, 2008 12:17 am It would be a show of this and nothing else.

[]:             Quote Post by Action_Bastard » Thu Aug 14, 2008 12:33 am I thought that too. Maybe she is a dog.

[]:             Quote Post by swamp147 » Thu Aug 14, 2008 12:40 am Weird weird lighting + Rei's shadow probably. Orange is lit. Brown is penumbra. Black is umbra. I'd definitely watch that.

[]:             Quote Post by Action_Bastard » Thu Aug 14, 2008 12:41 am Honestly, I would too.

[]:             Quote Post by SeanTucker » Thu Aug 14, 2008 9:05 am I'd only watch that if it was an omake or an extra feature, not if it was the main series... Actually, maybe the regular Eva storyline played out in that art style would be pretty interesting in a disturbing way. *pictures most of EoE in chibi style*

[]: Re: What if 4Kids had gotten Eva?             Quote Post by pat457 » Thu Aug 14, 2008 9:28 am SeanTucker wrote: *shudders* What do you think they'd have done to it?
